summary_md.en: Coverage is being expanded with official Immigration Services Agency sources for the Engineer/Specialist in Humanities/International Services residence status. A complete pathway record will be added after the source set is reviewed.
summary_md.zh-Hans: 正在通过出入国在留管理厅官方来源扩展技术、人文知识、国际业务在留资格信息。完整路径记录将在来源集完成审查后添加。
